metadata.name: Perform Market Valuation for a Warehouse

description: An agent needs to determine the market value of an industrial warehouse property.

nodes.task_description: Identify at least five comparable recent sales of similar warehouse properties in the same submarket.

expected_outcome.value: Agent compiles a list of relevant sales comparables.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the comparables, making adjustments for differences in size, age, condition, and location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates an adjusted price per square foot from the comps.

nodes.task_description: Produce a Broker Opinion of Value (BOV) report summarizing the analysis and concluding a likely market value.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a professional BOV document.
